name: Sourdough Rye
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Bread flour with 1 tbsp Gluten in bottom of cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sourdough starter, water, melted butter, barley flour, bread flour with gluten, rye flour, salt, sugar, dry milk, caraway seeds, dried onion, and dry yeast in a large bowl until combined.
2. Cover the dough and let it rest for 30 minutes.
3. Shape the dough into a round loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
4. Cover the dough and let it rise until doubled in size (about 1 hour).
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) and place a Dutch oven with lid in the oven to heat up.
6. Carefully remove the hot Dutch oven from the oven and invert the risen dough into the pot, sealing the edges.
7. Cover the pot with the lid and bake for 25 minutes.
8. Remove the lid and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
9. Turn off the heat and let the bread cool on a wire rack before slicing.
